summary: Iteration 148: Error Handling Layer - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) CosmicErrorBoundary wraps all routes in App.js with 'A dimensional rift appeared' fallback, (2) Axios interceptor installed globally with cosmic-themed toast messages for 429/500/502/503, (3) Starseed page shows CosmicInlineLoader during initial load and chapter transitions, (4) MultiverseRealms page shows CosmicInlineLoader during initial load and realm entry, (5) SpiritualCoach shows inline error messages in chat instead of toasts, (6) CosmicAssistant shows inline error messages in chat bubble, (7) All pages work correctly when APIs succeed (no regression).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Error handling layer fully implemented and tested. CosmicErrorBoundary wraps routes at App.js line 153. Axios interceptor setup at App.js line 29. Starseed page has initialLoading/fetchError states with CosmicInlineLoader ('Channeling starseed origins...') and CosmicError with retry. MultiverseRealms has same pattern ('Opening dimensional gateways...'). SpiritualCoach shows inline error messages in chat (lines 418-429). CosmicAssistant shows inline error messages (lines 134-145). All data-testids verified: cosmic-inline-loader, cosmic-error, cosmic-retry-btn, error-boundary-retry, error-boundary-home.
